question_tagalog: Ano yung best way para icomfort ka 'pag nasa bad mood ka na out of nowhere?
question_english: What is the best way to comfort you when you're in a bad mood out of nowhere?
quote_tagalog: Sasamahan kita kahit sa mga araw na tahimik ka.
quote_english: I will stick with you even on your quiet days.

question_tagalog: Anong word o phrase ko yung minsan nakaka-trigger ng inis mo 'pag bad mood ka?
question_english: What word or phrase of mine sometimes triggers your annoyance when you're in a bad mood?
quote_tagalog: Pasensya na 'pag minsan hindi ko agad nababasa ang mood mo.
quote_english: Sorry if sometimes I don't read your mood fast enough.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba na binibigyan kita ng space or niyayakap kita agad 'pag mainit ulo mo?
question_english: Do you prefer me giving you space or hugging you right away when you're hot-headed?
quote_tagalog: Sabihin mo lang kung kailangan mo muna mapag-isa.
quote_english: Just tell me if you need to be alone first.

question_tagalog: Paano mo nako-control yung anger mo para hindi ka makapagsalita ng masakit sakin?
question_english: How do you control your anger so you don't say hurtful words to me?
quote_tagalog: Ang mga salita ay parang laso, minsan mahirap bawiin.
quote_english: Words are like a ribbon, sometimes hard to pull back.

question_tagalog: Na-experience mo na bang mainis sakin tapos wala lang, nag-swings lang mood mo?
question_english: Have you ever experienced being annoyed with me for no reason, just mood swings?
quote_tagalog: Okay lang yan, naiintindihan ko ang topak mo.
quote_english: That's okay, I understand your moodiness.

question_tagalog: Ano feeling mo kapag hindi ko sineryoso yung tampo mo tapos nang-aasar pa ako?
question_english: How do you feel when I don't take your sulking seriously and tease you instead?
quote_tagalog: Minsan ang lambing ay nasa anyong asar.
quote_english: Sometimes affection takes the form of teasing.

question_tagalog: Mas okay ba sweet foods or alat pag gusto mong gumaan pakiramdam mo?
question_english: Is sweet foods or salty better when you want to feel better?
quote_tagalog: Bibilhan kita ng paborito mo para gumaan pakiramdam mo.
quote_english: I'll buy you your favorite to make you feel better.

question_tagalog: Pag feel mo iiyak ka out of frustration, ano unang gusto mong gawin ko?
question_english: When you feel like crying out of frustration, what do you want me to do first?
quote_tagalog: Handa ko laging pahirin ang mga luha mo.
quote_english: I'm always ready to wipe your tears.

question_tagalog: Anong klase ng biro ang off-limits lalo na pag wala ka sa mood?
question_english: What kind of joke is off-limits especially when you're not in the mood?
quote_tagalog: Irerespeto ko lagi ang boundaries mo.
quote_english: I will always respect your boundaries.

question_tagalog: Pag napapansin ko bang nag-iba tone of voice mo, dapat ba akong manahimik na lang?
question_english: If I notice your tone of voice changes, should I just stay quiet?
quote_tagalog: Minsan ang katahimikan ang pinaka-kailangan natin.
quote_english: Sometimes silence is what we need the most.

question_tagalog: Anong activity yung feeling mo best to release bad vibes kapag may topak ka?
question_english: Which activity do you feel is best to release bad vibes when you are having an episode?
quote_tagalog: Lalabas tayo para mag-relax ka lang.
quote_english: We'll go out just so you can relax.

question_tagalog: Pano ko ie-explain sayo yung side ko kapag ikaw mismo naba-blind ng emotions mo?
question_english: How do I explain my side to you when you yourself are blinded by your emotions?
quote_tagalog: Kalmahan natin hanggang kaya na mag-usap nang maayos.
quote_english: Let's calm down until we can talk properly.

question_tagalog: May moments ba na you feel sorry pag naging sungit ka nang di sadya?
question_english: Are there moments you feel sorry when you got grumpy unintentionally?
quote_tagalog: Tanggapin ko lahat ng 'sorry' mo basta galing sa puso.
quote_english: I'll accept all your 'sorries' as long as it's from the heart.

question_tagalog: Ano yung physical signs na sasabog na yung patience mo sakin?
question_english: What are the physical signs that your patience is about to burst?
quote_tagalog: Kabisado ko na ang bawat ihip ng hangin pag galit ka.
quote_english: I already memorized every breeze when you're mad.

question_tagalog: Bakit parang minsan dinadaan mo sa 'wala', pero halata namang meron?
question_english: Why does it sometimes seem you say 'nothing' when it's obvious there's something?
quote_tagalog: Babasahin ko ang mga matang hindi nagsasalita.
quote_english: I'll read the eyes that aren't talking.

question_tagalog: Pag sumasama loob mo, mas gusto mo ba na idaan ko sa gifts or hugs?
question_english: When you're feeling hurt, do you prefer I use gifts or hugs to soothe you?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang sasarap pa sa yakap na nag-aayos ng lahat.
quote_english: Nothing feels better than a hug that fixes everything.

question_tagalog: Nararamdaman mo rin ba agad pag bigla nang naging tahimik and heavy yung mood ko?
question_english: Do you also notice right away when my mood suddenly turns quiet and heavy?
quote_tagalog: Connected tayo, kaya nararamdaman ko rin.
quote_english: We are connected, that's why I feel it too.

question_tagalog: Pag sumusumpong mood swings mo randomly during PMS/Stress, ano ang number 1 rule for me?
question_english: When your mood swings randomly hit during PMS/Stress, what is the number 1 rule for me?
quote_tagalog: Habaan pa ang pasensya, lilipas din yan.
quote_english: Extend your patience more, it'll pass.

question_tagalog: May nagawa na ba ako during your mood swing na actually nagpakalma sayo secretly?
question_english: Have I done something during your mood swing that actually secretly calmed you down?
quote_tagalog: Ang tahimik na presence ko minsan sapat na.
quote_english: My quiet presence is sometimes enough.

question_tagalog: Kapag wala na tayo sa mood both, sino dapat una mag-approach at bakit?
question_english: When we're both not in the mood, who should approach first and why?
quote_tagalog: Laging isa lang dapat ang apoy at isa ang tubig.
quote_english: There must always be one fire and one water.

question_tagalog: Mabilis ka ba ma-irritate pag madaming tanong while you are feeling off?
question_english: Do you get irritated quickly with many questions while feeling off?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ko na tatanungin, yayakapin nalang kita.
quote_english: I won't ask anymore, I'll just hug you.

question_tagalog: Paano ginagawa yung the best 'peace offering' after nating magkatampuhan?
question_english: How is the best 'peace offering' done after we have a petty quarrel?
quote_tagalog: Sorry na po, I love you.
quote_english: I'm sorry, I love you.

question_tagalog: Nandidiri ka ba or umiirap in your head kapag lambing ako nang lambing habang badtrip ka?
question_english: Do you inwardly roll your eyes or cringe when I'm being too clingy while you're in a bad mood?
quote_tagalog: Ang corny man, baka dito mag-iba naman ihip ng hangin.
quote_english: Even if it's corny, maybe the wind will change direction.

question_tagalog: Ano ang difference ng 'naiinis ako' na totoong galit vs yung pwede mo pang i-baby?
question_english: What's the difference between 'I'm annoyed' that's real anger vs the one you can still baby?
quote_tagalog: Matututunan kong alamin kung kelan ka i-be-baby sa di dapat.
quote_english: I will learn when to baby you and when not to.

question_tagalog: Are you the type na mas nag-ooverthink pag biglang naging gloomy yung paligid natin?
question_english: Are you the type who overthinks more when our surroundings suddenly become gloomy?
quote_tagalog: Nandito lang ako para pawiin ang ulap sa utak mo.
quote_english: I'm just here to clear the clouds in your mind.

question_tagalog: Nakakatulong ba if nag-ssorry ako kahit minsan I just want peace kahit di ako wrong?
question_english: Does it help if I say sorry even if sometimes I just want peace even if I'm not wrong?
quote_tagalog: Minsan 'sorry' doesn't mean you're wrong, it means you value the relationship.
quote_english: Sometimes 'sorry' doesn't mean you're wrong, it means you value the relationship.

question_tagalog: Pag biglang na-mood swing ka tapos naramdaman mong na-badtrip narin ako, pano gagawin natin?
question_english: When you suddenly get a mood swing and felt that I got in a bad mood too, what do we do?
quote_tagalog: Hinga tayo ng malalim, reset muna.
quote_english: Let's take a deep breath, reset first.

question_tagalog: Anong pagkain ang literal na 'happy pill' pag ang pangit talaga ng araw mo?
question_english: What food is literally your 'happy pill' when your day is really bad?
quote_tagalog: Sa pagkain talaga minsan nako-cure ang topak.
quote_english: Moodiness is sometimes really cured through food.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang nilalambing ka with baby talk pag nagsusungit ka?
question_english: Do you want to be cuddled with baby talk when you're acting grumpy?
quote_tagalog: Baka lalong uminit ulo mo, pero susubukan ko parin.
quote_english: You might get more annoyed, but I'll still try.

question_tagalog: Pano mo sina-signal sakin explicitly na 'Huwag mo muna akong kulitin ngayon'?
question_english: How do you signal to me explicitly 'Don't bother me right now'?
quote_tagalog: Maghihintay ako hanggang sa ready ka na umikot ulit.
quote_english: I will wait until you're ready to spin again.

question_tagalog: Nakaka-add ba sa frustration mo pag I try to fix the problem instead of just listening?
question_english: Does it add to your frustration when I try to fix the problem instead of just listening?
quote_tagalog: Minsan gusto mo lang palang may makikinig sayo.
quote_english: Sometimes you just want someone to listen to you.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang pinaka-ayaw mong marinig mula sakin kapag nagsswing mood mo?
question_english: What word do you hate hearing the most from me when your mood swings?
quote_tagalog: Pipiliin ko ang masasabi ko para hindi ako makabawas.
quote_english: I'll choose what I say so I won't make it worse.

question_tagalog: Sino satin ang mas matindi ang pride kapag both na-trigger ang bad mood?
question_english: Who between us has stronger pride when both our bad moods are triggered?
quote_tagalog: Ibababa ang pride basta para sayo.
quote_english: Will lower the pride as long as it's for you.

question_tagalog: Okay lang ba sabihin ko 'Nasa mood ka ba na pag-usapan to?' before I say something important?
question_english: Is it okay if I say 'Are you in the mood to discuss this?' before I say something important?
quote_tagalog: Sinisigurado na nasa tamang state of mind tayo.
quote_english: Making sure we are in the right state of mind.

question_tagalog: Ilang hours ang maximum bago mawala yung pagiging sungit mo over small things?
question_english: How many hours maximum before your grumpiness over small things disappears?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ko kayang magalit sayo nang matagal.
quote_english: I can't stay mad at you for long.

question_tagalog: Paano mo ide-differentiate yung 'I want to be left alone' vs 'Please comfort me, I'm just acting like this'?
question_english: How do you differentiate your 'I want to be left alone' vs 'Please comfort me, I'm just acting like this'?
quote_tagalog: Sana may subtitle ang mood mo minsan.
quote_english: I wish your mood had subtitles sometimes.

question_tagalog: Kung naging dahilan ako ng bad mood mo sa umaga, paano ko babawiin yun by the end of the day?
question_english: If I caused your bad mood in the morning, how can I make it up by the end of the day?
quote_tagalog: Babawi ako buong araw, hanggang sa ngumiti ka na.
quote_english: I'll make it up all day, until you smile.

question_tagalog: Pinapansin mo ba the moment na ina-adjust ko yung kilos ko para lang pumabor sa mood mo?
question_english: Do you notice the moment I adjust my actions just to favor your mood?
quote_tagalog: Pansin ko din na inaalagaan mo ko deeply.
quote_english: I also notice that you care for me deeply.

question_tagalog: Pumapasok ba sayo sa isip minsan na you feel bad for projecting your stress on me?
question_english: Does it ever cross your mind sometimes that you feel bad for projecting your stress on me?
quote_tagalog: It's fine, nandito ako para i-absorb yan pag kaya.
quote_english: It's fine, I'm here to absorb it when I can.

question_tagalog: Do you expect me to apologize kahit it's your external factors causing your mood swings?
question_english: Do you expect me to apologize even if it's external factors causing your mood swings?
quote_tagalog: A comfort sorry is different from an admitting sorry.
quote_english: A comfort sorry is different from an admitting sorry.

question_tagalog: Ano ang 'safest' topic natin kapag alam natin na tension na ang paligid?
question_english: What is our 'safest' topic when we know there's tension around?
quote_tagalog: Mag-uusap ng kalokohan para gumaan.
quote_english: Will talk nonsense to lighten up.

question_tagalog: Bakit important sayo that I validate your feelings bago ko bigyan ng solution?
question_english: Why is it important to you that I validate your feelings before giving a solution?
quote_tagalog: Dahil kailangan mong malaman na nakikita ko ang pinagdadaanan mo.
quote_english: Because you need to know that I see what you're going through.

question_tagalog: Will it make it worse kung nagbiro ako sa chat habang nagla-lash out ka sakin over text?
question_english: Will it make it worse if I joke in chat while you're lashing out at me over text?
quote_tagalog: Mali ang timing minsan sa pagiging komedyante.
quote_english: Sometimes the timing of being a comedian is wrong.

question_tagalog: Ano tingin mo sa sarili mo kapag lumipas na yung topak mo and ikaw naman lalapit?
question_english: What do you think of yourself after your episode passes and you're the one approaching?
quote_tagalog: Nakakahiya man minsan, pero the love remains.
quote_english: Even if it's embarrassing sometimes, the love remains.

question_tagalog: Saang part ng araw mo pinaka-prone ka sa mood swings?
question_english: Which part of your day are you most prone to mood swings?
quote_tagalog: Umaga man o gabi, handa na me.
quote_english: Whether morning or night, I'm ready.

question_tagalog: May moments bang you test me subtly kung titiisin ko ba yung the way you act moody?
question_english: Are there moments you test me subtly if I will tolerate the way you act moody?
quote_tagalog: Ipapakita ko lagi na hindi kita susukuan.
quote_english: I will always show that I won't give up on you.

question_tagalog: Saan ba 'nanggagaling' yung random annoyance mo na di madalas masabi verbally?
question_english: Where does that random annoyance you often can't say verbally 'come from'?
quote_tagalog: Iiyak mo lang, hindi kita huhusgahan.
quote_english: Just cry it out, I won't judge you.

question_tagalog: Ano in-expect mo sakin after we resolve our conflict na gawa ng mood mo?
question_english: What do you expect from me after we resolve our conflict caused by your mood?
quote_tagalog: Babalik din agad tayo sa normalcy.
quote_english: We will immediately go back to normalcy.

question_tagalog: If nakikita na kitang pagod dahil stress at work, are my acts of service enough para ma-calm ka?
question_english: If I can see you're tired from stress at work, are my acts of service enough to calm you?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang magpapahinga sayo pag uwi mo.
quote_english: I will be your rest when you get home.

question_tagalog: Pwede ba kita hawakan (hands, hug) kahit ang isinusumbat mo is ayaw mo magpa-touch?
question_english: Can I touch you (hands, hug) even if you're stating you don't wanna be touched?
quote_tagalog: Minsan 'Wag mo kong hawakan' means 'Yakapin mo ko ng mahigpit'.
quote_english: Sometimes 'Don't touch me' means 'Hug me tight'.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang nilalabas mo lahat ng inis bago ako maki-interfere?
question_english: Do you want to pour out all your annoyance before I interfere?
quote_tagalog: Sasaluhin ko muna ang stress mo.
quote_english: I'll catch your stress first.

question_tagalog: If I also have a bad day and may mood ka din, who should step back to comfort?
question_english: If I also have a bad day and you're moody too, who should step back to comfort?
quote_tagalog: Give and take lagi sa relasyon na ito.
quote_english: Always give and take in this relationship.

question_tagalog: Pano ko gagawing light and easy ang environment after the literal 'mood storm' natin?
question_english: How will I make the environment light and easy after our literal 'mood storm'?
quote_tagalog: Tapos na ang ulan, bahaghari naman.
quote_english: The rain is over, here comes the rainbow.

question_tagalog: Are you conscious now of my triggers na nakakasama rin ng mood ko after mo ma-trigger?
question_english: Are you conscious now of my triggers that also badmouth my mood after yours?
quote_tagalog: Naging careful na tayo both.
quote_english: We've both become careful.

question_tagalog: Is there a specific text na would immediately flip your bad mood into a smile?
question_english: Is there a specific text that would immediately flip your bad mood into a smile?
quote_tagalog: Simple I love you could save the day.
quote_english: A simple I love you could save the day.

question_tagalog: Do you hate it when people say you're 'hormonal' kaya nagsswing mood mo?
question_english: Do you hate it when people say you're 'hormonal' that's why your mood swings?
quote_tagalog: Invalidating feelings is a no-no.
quote_english: Invalidating feelings is a no-no.

question_tagalog: Ano ang the best thing I did successfully na napahupa ang init ng ulo mo na without asking you anything?
question_english: What is the best thing I successfully did that eased your temper without asking you anything?
quote_tagalog: Naintindihan mo rin kahit wala akong sinabi.
quote_english: You also understand even if I said nothing.

question_tagalog: Pwede bang tawanan ang sitwasyon later on once pareho na tayong cool headed?
question_english: Can we laugh at the situation later on once we're both cool headed?
quote_tagalog: Tawanan the problem then face it together.
quote_english: Laugh at the problem then face it together.

question_tagalog: Feeling mo ba safe space ka pag gusto mo lang mainis without hurting me directly?
question_english: Do you feel you have a safe space when you just want to be annoyed without hurting me directly?
quote_tagalog: Sa piling ko, tanggap ko ang dark at light side mo.
quote_english: In my arms, I accept your dark and light sides.

question_tagalog: Paano mo tatanungin humbly without saying 'topak' kung okay naba me for you again?
question_english: How will you humbly ask without saying 'topak' if I'm okay for you again?
quote_tagalog: Bati na tayo please?
quote_english: Are we good now please?
